  Log:
  LDAPget is an Asterisk application for data retrieval from LDAP
  directories (e.g. OpenLDAP or ActiveDirectory).
  
  WWW: http://www.mezzo.net/asterisk/app_ldap.html
  
  PR:             ports/101050
